data.title: 7C Solarparken Launches Share Buyback of Up to EUR 4 Million
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from 7C Solarparken ( (DE:HRPK) ) is now available.

7C Solarparken AG has approved a share buyback programme of up to 2,436,776 shares, with a maximum total purchase price of EUR 4,020,680.40 and a price cap of EUR 1.65 per share. The buyback, authorised by a prior shareholder resolution, will be carried out on the stock exchange by a bank between 14 January 2026 and 31 May 2026, though the company may opt not to use the full amount or may modify or terminate the programme. The repurchased shares may be used for all purposes approved by the general meeting, underlining management’s flexibility in capital allocation and potentially signalling confidence in the company’s valuation to the market and existing shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (DE:HRPK) stock is a Hold with a EUR1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on 7C Solarparken stock, see the DE:HRPK Stock Forecast page.

More about 7C Solarparken

7C Solarparken AG is a Germany-based company listed on several European stock exchanges, including the regulated market in Frankfurt, and focuses on the solar energy sector, operating as an owner and operator of photovoltaic assets. The company targets investors through its listed shares (ISIN DE000A11QW68) and positions itself within the renewable energy and infrastructure investment market.

Average Trading Volume: 181,195

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €127.6M

See more insights into HRPK stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: VinFast Sets 2025 Vietnam EV Delivery Record With 175,099 Vehicles
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

VinFast Auto ( (VFS) ) has shared an announcement.

On January 13, 2026, VinFast reported preliminary domestic deliveries of 27,649 electric vehicles in Vietnam for December 2025, marking the highest monthly deliveries ever recorded by any automotive brand in the country. For full-year 2025, the company delivered a preliminary total of 175,099 EVs in its home market, also a national record and a milestone that underscores VinFast’s dominance in Vietnam’s automotive sector and the rapid pace of the country’s shift toward electric vehicles. The Limo Green model led December sales with 10,981 units and remained Vietnam’s best-selling seven-seat multi-purpose vehicle, while the VF 3 and VF 5 emerged as VinFast’s top sellers for 2025 with 44,585 and 43,913 vehicles delivered, respectively, supported by solid contributions from the Limo Green, VF 6, Herio Green and VF 7 lines. These delivery figures, which remain subject to year-end audit adjustments, highlight VinFast’s strengthening position in its core domestic market but are not by themselves a direct indicator of the company’s quarterly financial results, which depend on pricing and cost dynamics.

The most recent analyst rating on (VFS) stock is a Buy with a $5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on VinFast Auto stock, see the VFS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VFS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VFS is a Neutral.

VinFast Auto’s overall stock score is primarily impacted by its weak financial performance and valuation concerns. While there is growth in sales and international expansion, the company’s financial instability and negative profitability weigh heavily on its attractiveness. Technical indicators provide mixed signals, further contributing to a cautious outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on VFS stock, click here.

More about VinFast Auto

VinFast Auto Ltd., a subsidiary of Vingroup JSC listed on NASDAQ, is Vietnam’s leading automotive manufacturer focused on electric mobility. From its base in Hai Phong, the company produces electric SUVs, e-scooters, e-bikes and e-buses, serving the domestic market and exporting to key markets in Asia, North America and Europe as part of its strategy to promote a greener transportation future.

Average Trading Volume: 496,912

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $8.02B

SciSparc Ltd. ( (SPRC) ) has shared an update.

On January 13, 2026, SciSparc Ltd. entered into a securities purchase agreement with institutional and accredited investors for a registered direct offering of 766,170 ordinary shares at $1.00 per share, for expected gross proceeds of approximately $766,170. The shares are being issued under the company’s effective shelf registration statement on Form F-3, with closing anticipated around January 14, 2026, and the funds earmarked for working capital and general corporate needs, underscoring SciSparc’s continued reliance on equity financing to support its operations and maintain financial flexibility.

Comprehensive Healthcare Systems Inc. has engaged RedChip Companies to lead its investor relations and strategic communications, reflecting the company’s drive to broaden its visibility among institutional and retail investors as it reports accelerating client wins, positive adjusted EBITDA, and ongoing enhancements to its Novus 360 SaaS platform. data.title: Perseverance Extends Nasique Nickel Zone at Lac Gayot With Continuous Mineralization in All Drill Holes
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Perseverance Metals Inc ( (TSE:PMI) ) has provided an update.

Perseverance Metals has reported assay results from nine follow-up diamond drill holes at the Nasique Zone on its Lac Gayot Ni-Cu-Co-PGE project in Quebec, confirming disseminated magmatic sulphide mineralization in every hole and defining a continuous zone over roughly 60 metres of strike and 90 metres of vertical depth that remains open in all directions. The company highlights Nasique as a low-sulphide, high-tenor nickel system that could deliver very high grades with modest increases in sulphide content and as the first established nickel sulphide zone in the project’s upper komatiite sequence, reinforcing the broader exploration potential along the Venus East Trend and informing 2026 plans for high-resolution SQUID ground EM surveys and further drilling to expand and refine higher-grade targets.

More about Perseverance Metals Inc

Perseverance Metals Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on magmatic nickel, copper, cobalt and platinum group element (PGE) deposits at its district-scale Lac Gayot project in Quebec. The company is targeting multiple zones along the 6 km by 2 km Venus East mineralized trend, including newly identified nickel sulphide systems within historically underexplored upper komatiite volcanic sequences.

Average Trading Volume: 41,934

For an in-depth examination of PMI stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Photronics Consolidates Leadership with Key Executive Promotions
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Photronics ( (PLAB) ).

On January 12, 2026, Photronics reshaped its senior leadership team, appointing Chief Financial Officer Eric Rivera as president while he continues as principal financial officer, promoting Rui (Elie) Zhang to chief accounting officer with continued responsibilities as corporate controller, and naming Todd Alesio senior vice president and chief administrative officer while he remains head of global human resources. Announced publicly on January 13, 2026, the appointments are positioned by Chairman and CEO George Macricostas as a move to sharpen organizational clarity and reinforce accountability across key finance and administrative functions, signaling a consolidation of leadership roles designed to support the company’s execution under its existing management approach rather than a change in strategic direction.

The most recent analyst rating on (PLAB) stock is a Buy with a $45.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Photronics stock, see the PLAB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PLAB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PLAB is a Outperform.

Photronics’ strong financial performance and attractive valuation are the primary strengths, supported by strategic investments and revenue exceeding expectations. However, technical indicators suggest caution due to bearish momentum, and challenges in the integrated circuits market and geopolitical factors present risks.

To see Spark’s full report on PLAB stock, click here.

More about Photronics

Photronics, Inc., headquartered in Brookfield, Conn., is a leading worldwide manufacturer of photomasks for integrated circuits and flat panel displays. These high-precision quartz plates, which carry microscopic images of electronic circuits, are critical components in semiconductor and display production. Founded in 1969, the company operates 11 manufacturing facilities across Asia, Europe and North America, serving global chip and display makers as a long-standing, trusted supplier in the photomask market.

Average Trading Volume: 1,193,342

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.97B

data.title: Rezolve Ai Hikes 2026 Guidance to $350 Million as ARR and Enterprise Adoption Surge
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Rezolve AI ( (RZLV) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On January 13, 2026, Rezolve Ai issued sharply higher revenue guidance for 2025 and 2026, signaling a step-change in scale as enterprise adoption of its Agentic Commerce platform accelerates. The company now expects at least $40 million in revenue for 2025 and about $350 million in 2026—nearly double prior market expectations and implying almost 10-fold annual growth—while reaffirming plans to exit 2026 with a minimum $500 million annual recurring revenue run rate. Rezolve reported exiting 2025 with roughly $209 million in ARR and a record December in which revenue is expected to exceed $17 million, marking its first profitable month and demonstrating operating leverage. Rapid expansion in 2025 included scaling to more than 1,000 employees, 24 offices, and over 650 enterprise customers, deepening strategic partnerships with Microsoft and Google, and securing $250 million in repeat and new institutional funding, developments that collectively strengthen its balance sheet, validate its business model and reinforce its positioning as core infrastructure for large brands such as Adidas, Gucci, Target, Standard Chartered and Commerzbank.

The most recent analyst rating on (RZLV) stock is a Hold with a $3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rezolve AI stock, see the RZLV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RZLV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RZLV is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial fundamentals—ongoing large losses, negative equity, and negative free cash flow with financing reliance. Technicals provide some near-term support (above 20/50-day averages with positive MACD), but the longer-term trend is mixed and valuation is unclear due to missing P/E and dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on RZLV stock, click here.

More about Rezolve AI

Rezolve Ai (NASDAQ: RZLV) is an industry leader in AI-powered solutions focused on Agentic Commerce and customer engagement, offering its Brain Suite enterprise AI platform to help global brands enhance search, transactions, fulfillment and personalization at scale. The company serves more than 650 enterprise customers across sectors including retail, fashion, financial services and payments, and operates with over 1,000 employees in 24 global offices, processing tens of billions of API calls and reaching hundreds of millions of users worldwide.

An update from Sino-Ocean Service Holding Ltd. ( (HK:6677) ) is now available.

Sino-Ocean Service Holding Limited has announced a one-day delay in sending its shareholder circular related to its 2026–2028 master non-exempt continuing connected transaction agreements, pushing the expected despatch date from 13 January 2026 to 14 January 2026 due to additional time required for bulk printing. data.title: Collective Mining Unveils High-Grade Silver-Rich Vein Discovery at San Antonio’s Pound Target
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Collective Mining ( (TSE:CNL) ) has provided an announcement.

On January 13, 2026, Collective Mining reported assay results from seventeen diamond drill holes at the Pound target within its San Antonio Project in Colombia, confirming a new shallow, high-grade, silver-dominant vein system extending roughly 825 metres along strike and up to 850 metres vertically, with mineralization remaining open in all directions. The drilling also intersected deeper, gold-dominant high-grade veins, underscoring Pound as a multi-phase mineralized system with both silver-rich and gold-rich structures. Backed by US$135 million in cash as of December 1, 2025, the company is fully funded for an aggressive 2026 campaign of up to 100,000 metres of additional drilling across San Antonio and its flagship Guayabales project, and expects to resume drilling at San Antonio imminently, positioning the discovery as a potentially significant value driver and enhancing the project’s exploration upside for shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CNL) stock is a Hold with a C$21.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Collective Mining stock, see the TSE:CNL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:CNL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:CNL is a Neutral.

The score is constrained primarily by weak financial performance typical of a pre-revenue explorer (no revenue, widening losses, and rising cash burn), partially offset by a low-debt balance sheet. Technicals are a key positive with the price above major moving averages and positive momentum indicators. Valuation is neutral-to-weak because a negative P/E reflects ongoing losses and there is no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:CNL stock, click here.

More about Collective Mining

Collective Mining Ltd. is a Canada-based mineral exploration company focused on discovering and advancing precious and base metal deposits in Colombia. Its principal assets are the Guayabales and San Antonio projects in the Caldas Department, where it targets porphyry and related vein-style gold, silver and copper systems supported by strong local infrastructure, including highway and powerline access.

data.title: Azul Closes R$7.4 Billion Share Offering and Converts Preferred Stock as Chapter 11 Plan Advances
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Azul SA ( (AZULD) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On January 13, 2026, Azul S.A. announced the closing of its primary public offering of common and preferred shares, which raised approximately R$7.44 billion through the issuance of over 1.44 trillion new shares and increased the company’s capital stock to about R$14.57 billion. As part of this recapitalization, investors also received subscription warrants on a one‑for‑one basis with the shares subscribed, with the exercise period ending January 12, 2026, and the resulting additional capital increase scheduled to be ratified by the board on January 14, 2026. On January 12, 2026, Azul’s shareholders and preferred shareholders approved the conversion of all preferred shares into common shares at a 75‑to‑1 ratio, resulting in a capital structure composed solely of common shares totaling roughly 55.08 trillion and the delisting of preferred shares from B3 as of January 13, 2026. Looking ahead, the company plans to complete warrant-related capital increases, convert its first issuance of convertible debentures into common equity under adjusted ratios, issue GUC warrants that could grant unsecured creditors up to 5.5% of fully diluted equity, and launch a new public equity offering of up to US$950 million at a 30% valuation discount that is expected to dilute the then‑existing shareholder base by about 80%. These measures mark substantial progress in implementing Azul’s Chapter 11 restructuring plan, significantly reshaping its capital structure, shifting more value toward creditors and new money investors, and implying material dilution but a potentially more sustainable financial profile for existing shareholders and other market participants.

The most recent analyst rating on (AZULD) stock is a Hold with a $0.06 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Azul SA stock, see the AZULD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AZULD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AZULD is a Underperform.

The score is pressured primarily by weak financial performance—persistent losses alongside very high leverage and negative equity—followed by poor technicals showing a pronounced downtrend. Valuation provides limited offset because the negative P/E reflects loss-making performance and there is no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on AZULD stock, click here.

More about Azul SA

Azul S.A. is a Brazilian airline listed on B3 and trading over the counter in the U.S., operating in the commercial aviation sector with a focus on passenger and related services in Brazil. The company is undergoing a court-supervised restructuring under a Chapter 11 plan, involving significant balance-sheet adjustments, capital raises and security conversions aimed at strengthening its capital structure while maintaining regular operations for customers and other stakeholders.

Average Trading Volume: 25

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $10248.1B

Find detailed analytics on AZULD stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
